items.title: CDC cuts leave US less prepared for disease outbreaks, former officials warn
items.title_en: CDC cuts leave US less prepared for disease outbreaks, former officials warn
items.body: As measles, hantavirus and cyclospora spread, experts say lost staff and expertise are slowing the response A series of health challenges – hantavirus , screwworm , Ebola , cyclospora , measles , whooping cough , bird flu – are exposing the widening gaps in America’s ability to prevent, identify and halt infectious…
